name: baton-dev
description: A CLI for managing private per-project agent specs outside shared repositories

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && bun build ./index.ts --target=node --outfile ./dist/index.js && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='dist/index.js'; const s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'); const h='#!/usr/bin/env node\n'; fs.writeFileSync(p, s.startsWith(h) ? s : h+s); fs.chmodSync(p, 0o755);"
scripts.build-executable: rm -rf artifacts && mkdir -p artifacts && bun build ./index.ts --compile --outfile ./artifacts/baton
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run build && npm pack --dry-run
scripts.release:git: version=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && branch=$(git branch --show-current) && git add . && git commit --allow-empty -m "Release v$version" && git push origin "$branch" && (git tag -d "v$version" || true) && git tag "v$version" && git push origin "v$version"
scripts.release: npm run release:npm && npm run release:git
